name: Super Sugar Hallucination
description: Super Sugar Hallucination is a free innovative online game for boys that mixes bubble shoot and Ping-Pong. Excellent graphics and animation make you relax. There are many challenging levels waiting for you to unlock. All the levels will challenge your attention and reflex. I guess it's easy for you. Are you ready to try it now?
